# Tour Kit - LLM Documentation Reference

> Tour Kit is a headless onboarding and product tour library for React.
> Documentation: apps/docs/content/docs/
> This file provides a quick reference for LLMs working with the codebase.

## Package Overview

| Package | Purpose | Key Exports |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| @tour-kit/core | Framework-agnostic logic | useTour, useStep, TourProvider, createTour |
| @tour-kit/react | React components | Tour, TourCard, TourStep, TourOverlay |
| @tour-kit/hints | Hint beacons | Hint, HintHotspot, HintTooltip, useHint |
| @tour-kit/adoption | Feature tracking | AdoptionProvider, useFeature, useNudge, AdoptionNudge |
| @tour-kit/analytics | Analytics plugins | AnalyticsProvider, useAnalytics, createAnalytics |
| @tour-kit/announcements | Announcements | AnnouncementsProvider, useAnnouncement, Modal/Toast/Banner/Slideout/Spotlight |
| @tour-kit/checklists | Onboarding checklists | ChecklistProvider, useChecklist, Checklist, ChecklistPanel |
| @tour-kit/media | Media embedding | TourMedia, YouTubeEmbed, VimeoEmbed, LoomEmbed, WistiaEmbed, GifPlayer, LottiePlayer |
| @tour-kit/scheduling | Time scheduling | useSchedule, checkSchedule, isScheduleActive, BUSINESS_HOURS_PRESETS |

## Key Patterns

### Headless-First Architecture
- Logic in @tour-kit/core
- Components are thin wrappers
- Headless variants available for all UI packages

### Unified Slot Pattern
All UI packages support asChild via UnifiedSlot:
- Radix UI style: `<Button asChild><Link /></Button>`
- Base UI style: `<Button>{(props) => <Link {...props} />}</Button>`

### Provider Hierarchy
```jsx
<AnalyticsProvider>
  <TourKitProvider>
    <AdoptionProvider>
      <AnnouncementsProvider>
        <ChecklistProvider>
          <App />
        </ChecklistProvider>
      </AnnouncementsProvider>
    </AdoptionProvider>
  </TourKitProvider>
</AnalyticsProvider>
```

## Common Tasks

### Creating a Tour
```tsx
import { TourProvider, Tour } from '@tour-kit/react'

const tour = createTour({
  id: 'onboarding',
  steps: [
    { id: 'welcome', target: '#welcome', title: 'Welcome!' },
    { id: 'features', target: '#features', title: 'Features' },
  ],
})

<TourProvider tour={tour}>
  <Tour />
</TourProvider>
```

### Tracking Analytics
```tsx
import { AnalyticsProvider, createAnalytics, posthogPlugin } from '@tour-kit/analytics'

const analytics = createAnalytics({
  plugins: [posthogPlugin()],
})

<AnalyticsProvider analytics={analytics}>
  <App />
</AnalyticsProvider>
```

### Creating Announcements
```tsx
import { AnnouncementsProvider, AnnouncementModal } from '@tour-kit/announcements'

<AnnouncementsProvider announcements={[
  { id: 'welcome', variant: 'modal', title: 'Welcome!', frequency: 'once' }
]}>
  <AnnouncementModal id="welcome" />
</AnnouncementsProvider>
```

### Creating Checklists
```tsx
import { ChecklistProvider, ChecklistPanel, createChecklist } from '@tour-kit/checklists'

<ChecklistProvider checklists={[createChecklist({
  id: 'setup',
  title: 'Get Started',
  tasks: [
    { id: 'profile', title: 'Complete profile', action: { type: 'navigate', url: '/settings' } },
    { id: 'invite', title: 'Invite team', dependsOn: ['profile'] },
  ]
})]}>
  <ChecklistPanel checklistId="setup" />
</ChecklistProvider>
```

### Tracking Feature Adoption
```tsx
import { AdoptionProvider, useFeature, AdoptionNudge } from '@tour-kit/adoption'

<AdoptionProvider features={[
  { id: 'export', name: 'Export', trigger: 'click', adoptionCriteria: { minUses: 3 } }
]}>
  <FeatureButton featureId="export">Export</FeatureButton>
  <AdoptionNudge />
</AdoptionProvider>
```

### Embedding Media
```tsx
import { TourMedia } from '@tour-kit/media'

// Auto-detects media type from URL
<TourMedia src="https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123" alt="Tutorial" />
<TourMedia src="/demo.gif" alt="Demo animation" />
<TourMedia src="/animation.json" alt="Success animation" /> // Lottie
```

### Schedule-Based Content
```tsx
import { useSchedule } from '@tour-kit/scheduling'

const isActive = useSchedule({
  daysOfWeek: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], // Monday-Friday
  timeOfDay: { start: '09:00', end: '17:00' },
  timezone: 'America/New_York',
})

{isActive && <AnnouncementBanner id="promo" />}
```

## Accessibility

- WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
- Focus trap in tour cards (useFocusTrap)
- Keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Escape, Tab)
- Screen reader announcements (aria-live)
- Reduced motion support (prefers-reduced-motion)

## File Locations

- Documentation: apps/docs/content/docs/
- Core hooks: packages/core/src/hooks/
- React components: packages/react/src/components/
- Types: packages/*/src/types/
- Tests: packages/*/src/__tests__/
- Coding rules: tour-kit/rules/

## Commands

```bash
pnpm install          # Install dependencies
pnpm build            # Build all packages
pnpm dev              # Watch mode
pnpm typecheck        # Type checking
pnpm test             # Run tests
pnpm --filter @tour-kit/core build  # Build single package
```

## Documentation Site Structure

```
apps/docs/content/docs/
├── index.mdx                  # Landing
├── getting-started/           # Installation, quick start (4 pages)
├── core/                      # @tour-kit/core (15 pages)
│   ├── hooks/                 # useTour, useStep, useFocusTrap, etc.
│   ├── providers/             # TourProvider, TourKitProvider
│   ├── utilities/             # createTour, createStep, helpers
│   └── types/                 # TourConfig, StepConfig, etc.
├── react/                     # @tour-kit/react (14 pages)
│   ├── components/            # Tour, TourCard, TourStep, etc.
│   ├── headless/              # TourCardHeadless, TourOverlayHeadless
│   ├── adapters/              # Next.js, React Router
│   └── styling/               # CSS variables, Tailwind
├── hints/                     # @tour-kit/hints (4+ pages)
│   ├── components/            # Hint, HintHotspot, HintTooltip
│   └── headless/              # HintHeadless variants
├── adoption/                  # @tour-kit/adoption (16 pages)
│   ├── providers/             # AdoptionProvider
│   ├── hooks/                 # useFeature, useNudge, useAdoptionStats
│   ├── components/            # AdoptionNudge, FeatureButton, IfAdopted
│   ├── dashboard/             # AdoptionDashboard, AdoptionTable, Charts
│   └── analytics/             # Analytics integration
├── analytics/                 # @tour-kit/analytics (15 pages)
│   ├── providers/             # AnalyticsProvider
│   ├── hooks/                 # useAnalytics, useAnalyticsOptional
│   └── plugins/               # console, posthog, mixpanel, amplitude, ga4
├── announcements/             # @tour-kit/announcements (21 pages)
│   ├── providers/             # AnnouncementsProvider
│   ├── hooks/                 # useAnnouncement, useAnnouncementQueue
│   ├── components/            # Modal, Slideout, Banner, Toast, Spotlight
│   ├── headless/              # HeadlessModal, HeadlessBanner, etc.
│   └── configuration/         # Frequency, Audience, Queue
├── checklists/                # @tour-kit/checklists (26 pages)
│   ├── providers/             # ChecklistProvider
│   ├── hooks/                 # useChecklist, useTask, useChecklistPersistence
│   ├── components/            # Checklist, ChecklistTask, ChecklistPanel
│   ├── headless/              # ChecklistHeadless, TaskHeadless
│   └── utilities/             # createChecklist, dependencies, progress
├── media/                     # @tour-kit/media (21 pages)
│   ├── components/            # TourMedia, YouTubeEmbed, GifPlayer, etc.
│   ├── headless/              # MediaHeadless
│   ├── hooks/                 # useMediaEvents, usePrefersReducedMotion
│   └── utilities/             # URL parsing, embed builders
├── scheduling/                # @tour-kit/scheduling (18 pages)
│   ├── hooks/                 # useSchedule, useScheduleStatus
│   ├── utilities/             # checkSchedule, timezone, blackouts
│   └── presets/               # BUSINESS_HOURS_PRESETS
├── guides/                    # Tutorials and guides (14 pages)
│   ├── nextjs.mdx             # Next.js integration
│   ├── vite.mdx               # Vite setup
│   ├── accessibility.mdx      # A11y best practices
│   ├── analytics-integration.mdx
│   ├── adoption-analytics.mdx
│   └── checklists-tours.mdx
├── examples/                  # Code examples (3 pages)
│   ├── basic-tour.mdx
│   ├── onboarding-flow.mdx
│   └── headless-custom.mdx
└── api/                       # API reference (10 pages)
    ├── core.mdx
    ├── react.mdx
    ├── hints.mdx
    ├── adoption.mdx
    ├── analytics.mdx
    ├── announcements.mdx
    ├── checklists.mdx
    ├── media.mdx
    └── scheduling.mdx
```

**Total: ~150+ documentation pages**

## Extended Package APIs

### @tour-kit/adoption
```typescript
// Hooks
useFeature(featureId) → { feature, usage, isAdopted, status, trackUsage }
useAdoptionStats() → { totalFeatures, adoptedCount, adoptionRate, byCategory }
useNudge() → { currentNudge, queue, show, dismiss, skip }

// Components
AdoptionNudge, FeatureButton, IfAdopted, IfNotAdopted, NewFeatureBadge
AdoptionDashboard, AdoptionTable, AdoptionCategoryChart, AdoptionStatsGrid

// Types
type AdoptionStatus = 'not_started' | 'exploring' | 'adopted' | 'churned'
interface Feature { id, name, trigger, adoptionCriteria, category?, priority? }
```

### @tour-kit/analytics
```typescript
// Core
createAnalytics(config) → TourAnalytics
TourAnalytics.track(eventName, data), .tourStarted(), .stepViewed(), .hintShown()

// Hooks
useAnalytics() → TourAnalytics (throws if not in provider)
useAnalyticsOptional() → TourAnalytics | null

// Plugins
consolePlugin(), posthogPlugin(), mixpanelPlugin(), amplitudePlugin(), googleAnalyticsPlugin()

// Event Types
type TourEventName = 'tour_started' | 'tour_completed' | 'step_viewed' | 'hint_shown' | ...
```

### @tour-kit/announcements
```typescript
// Hooks
useAnnouncement(id) → { announcement, isVisible, show, dismiss, complete }
useAnnouncements() → { announcements, visible, showAnnouncement }
useAnnouncementQueue() → { queue, current, next, clear }

// Components (5 variants)
AnnouncementModal, AnnouncementSlideout, AnnouncementBanner, AnnouncementToast, AnnouncementSpotlight
// Headless versions: HeadlessModal, HeadlessSlideout, HeadlessBanner, HeadlessToast, HeadlessSpotlight

// Types
type AnnouncementVariant = 'modal' | 'slideout' | 'banner' | 'toast' | 'spotlight'
type FrequencyRule = 'once' | 'session' | 'always' | { type: 'times', count: N } | { type: 'interval', days: N }
type AnnouncementPriority = 'low' | 'normal' | 'high' | 'critical'
```

### @tour-kit/checklists
```typescript
// Hooks
useChecklist(id) → { checklist, tasks, progress, completeTask, reset }
useTask(checklistId, taskId) → { task, isCompleted, isLocked, complete }
useChecklistPersistence(id) → { save, load, clear }

// Components
Checklist, ChecklistTask, ChecklistProgress, ChecklistLauncher, ChecklistPanel
// Headless: ChecklistHeadless, TaskHeadless

// Utilities
createChecklist(config), createTask(config)
calculateProgress(state), canCompleteTask(taskId, state), hasCircularDependency(tasks)

// Types
type TaskAction = { type: 'navigate', url } | { type: 'callback', handler } | { type: 'tour', tourId }
interface ChecklistProgress { completed, total, percentage, remaining }
```

### @tour-kit/media
```typescript
// Components
TourMedia - Auto-detecting media component
YouTubeEmbed, VimeoEmbed, LoomEmbed, WistiaEmbed, NativeVideo, GifPlayer, LottiePlayer
MediaHeadless - Render prop version

// Hooks
useMediaEvents(options) → { isPlaying, currentTime, duration, play, pause, seek }
usePrefersReducedMotion() → boolean
useResponsiveSource(sources) → ResponsiveSource

// Utilities
parseMediaUrl(url) → { type, id, embedUrl }
detectMediaType(url) → MediaType
extractYouTubeId(url), extractVimeoId(url), extractLoomId(url), extractWistiaId(url)
buildYouTubeEmbedUrl(id, options), buildVimeoEmbedUrl(id, options)

// Types
type MediaType = 'youtube' | 'vimeo' | 'loom' | 'wistia' | 'video' | 'gif' | 'lottie' | 'image'
```

### @tour-kit/scheduling
```typescript
// Hooks
useSchedule(schedule, options?) → isActive: boolean
useScheduleStatus(schedule) → { isActive, reason, nextCheck }
useUserTimezone() → { timezone, isSupported, isDST }

// Core Functions
checkSchedule(schedule, options?) → boolean
isScheduleActive(schedule) → boolean
getScheduleStatus(schedule) → { isActive, reason }

// Utilities
isWithinDateRange(), isWithinTimeRange(), isWithinBusinessHours()
isInBlackoutPeriod(), matchesRecurringPattern()
getDayOfWeek(), isAllowedDay(), DAY_GROUPS.weekdays, DAY_GROUPS.weekend

// Constants
BUSINESS_HOURS_PRESETS.standard  // 9-5 Mon-Fri
BUSINESS_HOURS_PRESETS.extended  // 8-8 Mon-Sat

// Types
interface Schedule { startAt?, endAt?, daysOfWeek?, timeOfDay?, timezone?, blackouts?, recurring? }
type ScheduleInactiveReason = 'before_start_date' | 'after_end_date' | 'wrong_day_of_week' | 'in_blackout' | ...
```

## Key TypeScript Types

```typescript
// Tour
interface TourStep { id: string; target: string; title?: string; description?: string }
interface TourConfig { id: string; steps: TourStep[] }

// Announcements
type AnnouncementVariant = 'modal' | 'toast' | 'banner' | 'slideout' | 'spotlight'
type FrequencyRule = 'once' | 'session' | 'always' | { type: 'times'; count: number }

// Checklists
interface ChecklistTaskConfig { id: string; title: string; dependsOn?: string[]; action?: TaskAction }

// Scheduling
interface Schedule { startAt?: string; endAt?: string; daysOfWeek?: number[]; timeOfDay?: TimeRange }

// Adoption
type AdoptionStatus = 'not_started' | 'exploring' | 'adopted' | 'churned'

// Analytics
type TourEventName = 'tour_started' | 'tour_completed' | 'step_viewed' | 'hint_shown' | ...

// Media
type MediaType = 'youtube' | 'vimeo' | 'loom' | 'wistia' | 'video' | 'gif' | 'lottie' | 'image'
```

## Cross-Package Integration Patterns

### Analytics + Adoption
```tsx
// Adoption events auto-track if analytics provider exists
<AnalyticsProvider analytics={analytics}>
  <AdoptionProvider features={features}>
    {/* feature_used, feature_adopted, nudge_shown events auto-tracked */}
  </AdoptionProvider>
</AnalyticsProvider>
```

### Announcements + Scheduling
```tsx
// Show announcement only during business hours
const announcement = {
  id: 'promo',
  variant: 'banner',
  schedule: {
    daysOfWeek: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    timeOfDay: { start: '09:00', end: '17:00' },
  }
}
```

### Checklists + Tours
```tsx
// Launch tour from checklist task
const task = {
  id: 'learn-feature',
  title: 'Learn the feature',
  action: { type: 'tour', tourId: 'feature-tour' }
}
```

## Related Files

- CLAUDE.md - Main project documentation for Claude
- packages/*/CLAUDE.md - Package-specific documentation
- apps/docs/CLAUDE.md - Documentation site conventions
- tour-kit/rules/ - Coding rules and standards
